title: Grilled Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make recipe featuring marinated chicken skewers grilled to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, olive oil, honey, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the skewers are cooking, crumble the crispy bacon bits into a bowl.
Once the skewers are done, brush them with the bacon bits.
